title: FWS & TAW Tractor Beam Fix
description: CWSM Client-side addon that fixes custom tractor beam rotation not applying correctly (Made for the FWS and TAW resource packs.)
body:
### REQUIREMENTS: EMF 3.0+ & ETF 7.0+
**Overview:** 
This client-side mod fixes the Wither Storm's Tractor Beams not being orientable.
Made specifically for the resource packs:
- VN4's Fresh Wither Storm
- Totally Accurate Wither Storm

Make sure to report bugs in [VillagerN4's Discord Server!](https://discord.gg/fuXfwpJtvg)
